stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Match the following descriptions with the flaps depicted in the attached figure:

a. This flap has a simple hinge towards the rear.
b. This flap can be used for take-off/landing and changes camber and area.
c. This flap has a gap towards the rear.
d. This flap changes camber but the area stays the same. When fully extended produces more CD than CL.
